entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away of topsoil by physical forces such as water and wind

entities.name: LAND QUALITIES
entities.description: The physical and chemical properties of land that determine its suitability for various uses

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Sources of water that are potentially useful as reservoirs or as sources of water supply

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: TOPOGRAPHIC FEATURES
entities.description: The physical features of an area of land, such as slope and elevation

entities.name: LAND-USE/LAND-COVER PATTERN
entities.description: The spatial arrangement of different land uses and land cover types

entities.name: YEZAT WATERSHED
entities.description: The specific geographic area in North Western Ethiopia where the research was conducted

entities.name: LANDSAT IMAGERIES
entities.description: Satellite imagery used for monitoring land cover changes

entities.name: SUPERVISED CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A process of categorizing pixels in an image into predefined classes

entities.name: MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ALGORITHM
entities.description: A statistical method used within supervised classification to assign pixels to classes

entities.name: BIOMASS LEVELS
entities.description: The total mass of organisms in a given area or volume

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A graphical indicator used to analyze remote sensing imagery to assess vegetation health

entities.name: REVISED UNIVERSAL SOIL LOSS EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical model used to estimate the average annual rate of soil erosion

entities.name: GIS
entities.description: Geographic Information System used for capturing, storing, and analyzing spatial data

entities.name: SOIL EROSION RISK
entities.description: The potential for soil to be eroded based on various environmental factors

entities.name: GRASSLAND
entities.description: Land covered with grass

entities.name: WOODLAND
entities.description: Land covered with trees

entities.name: HOMESTEADS
entities.description: Residential areas within the watershed

entities.name: CULTIVATED LAND
entities.description: Land used for agricultural crops

entities.name: SHRUB/BUSHLAND
entities.description: Land covered with shrubs and bushes

entities.name: VEGETATION COVER
entities.description: The proportion of the ground surface covered by vegetation

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: A program implemented to manage and develop watershed resources

entities.name: SOIL LOSSES
entities.description: The amount of soil removed from a site by erosion

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Approaches to land use that maintain soil health and productivity
